# Fionna MacTine

A pyromancer sorcerer whose temper ignites flames she cannot always control.

> **Ancestry:** Faerie
> **Community:** Orderborne
> **Role:** Arcanist

## Features

**Channel:** Whenever this ally gains the spotlight, **place 1 token** on this card.

**Fireball:** **Spend 6 tokens** to have _Fionna_ launch a sphere of fire at a target within Very Far range. The target and all creatures within Very Close range of it must make a Reaction Roll (13). Targets that fail take **3d20+5** magic damage. Targets that succeed take half damage.
